title: Kanyadanam
desc: A father's world revolves around his five daughters as he raises them with a lot of love. However, he wonders if they will receive the same care when they get married and move in with their in-laws.

title: Hridayam
desc: The life of the members of two families who are busy in their own lives, gets connected to each other due to an unfortunate incident.

title: Sundara Purushan
desc: A man loves his cousin, but circumstances force him to leave home. Years later, when he learns that she loves someone else, he tries to help her reunite with her lover.

title: Punnaram
desc: Twins separated at birth reunite at school, leading their estranged parents to face the traumas that tore their family apart.

title: Peythozhiyathe
desc: Despite her warmth and courage, Charulatha yearns for love to escape her estranged father and cruel stepmother in a tumultuous household.

title: Chattambi Paaru
desc: Despite coming from a family experiencing financial hardship, Parvati valiantly sets out on her own to build a life and support her family.

title: Swayamvarapanthal
desc: Nandini, a devoted village girl, crosses paths with Surya, whose resentment toward his mother drives him to pursue a relationship with her.

title: Amme Mookambike
desc: After being abandoned at the temple as a child, Sauparnika is raised by Surendran as a florist. However, her reputation for answered prayers shifts when Sandeep enters her life.

title: Mangalyam Thanthunanena
desc: Nidhi, a fearless and kind-hearted young woman, marries her soulmate Gowtham. However, soon she finds herself in the middle of family conspiracies aimed at tearing them apart.

title: Anju Sundarikal
desc: Five friends settle into a strict hostel, unaware of its grim past. Their mischievous plan to shelter a mysterious guest backfires, unleashing a series of strange incidents.
